name: multiclass-classification
title: Multiclass Classification with XGBoost (Done Right)
description: Build a production-ready XGBoost multiclass classifier for tabular data: per-class metrics (precision/recall/F1), confusion matrix analysis, macro vs micro vs weighted F1, sample weighting for imbalance, top-K accuracy, one-vs-rest ROC, and per-class SHAP explanations. Includes a self-contained marimo notebook with the full worked example.
